Workflow.name: Ascension-Workflow-Immediate-Termination

Variable.name: identityName
Variable.Description: The custom model that is used to house and pass application data.

Variable.name: identityModel
Variable.Description: The custom model that is used to house and pass application data.

Variable.name: identityDisplayName
Variable.Description: The displayName of the identity being updated. Query for this using a projection query and fall back to the name.

Variable.name: trace
Variable.Description: Used for debugging this workflow and when set to true trace will be sent to stdout.

Workflow.Description: Disable all accounts when an employee leaves the company.

Step.name: Initialize
Step.Description: Initialize the data for the identity that we are about to terminate.

Step.name: Determine Action
Step.Description: Confirmation form whether to proceed with immediate termination or not.

Step.name: Call Subprocess
Step.Description: Process the user for immediate Termination and call wrapper workflow.
